panels.title: National Center
panels.scene: Ethan/Kian room — bunk beds, rivalry posters — briefing: *technique, sleep, no hero nonsense.*

panels.scene: Spinning hook guard callback — Ethan names the kick — Ariana extra reps.

panels.scene: Ramyeon life · Fanta drought · kimchi trade · Ariana jerky pocket.

panels.title: Bunk Bed Deal [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Ethan/Kian top bunk negotiation — ramen debt if both make roster.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "If we both make it, you owe me ramen in Seoul." · Ethan: "If you make it, I'll buy the whole shop."

panels.title: Logan Whisper [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Briefing room back row — Logan to TJ — team not fine.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "We're not fine." · TJ: "We're not. And that's okay."

panels.title: MV Rules Brief [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV at whiteboard — **technique, sleep, no hero nonsense** until bracket.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You are teammates until the bracket says otherwise."

panels.scene: Bus pulls away — team bags — Korean flag on building — first breath of camp.

panels.title: Locker Assignments
panels.scene: Name tags — Ethan next to Kian — Kieryn claims dance-studio map — Logan lost.

panels.title: Kieryn K-Pop Beat [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Warm-up line — Kieryn counts under breath — TJ flinches at wrong tempo.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Four-eight. Not your funeral march." · TJ: "Try keeping pace on one leg."

panels.title: Pad Rotation · Ariana Extra [TEACH]
panels.scene: Hydration break — Ariana still on pads — Logan holds water unasked.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Extra reps aren't punishment. They're insurance."

panels.title: Spinning Hook Name [TEACH]
panels.scene: Ethan at mirror — names kick aloud — guard stays up on demo.
panels.dialogue: Ethan: "Spinning hook. Pivot foot. Head target. Guard doesn't drop."

panels.title: Kimchi Trade [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Cafeteria table — Kian trades banchan for Ethan's airport Fanta sip.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "One sip only." · Ethan: "That's not a trade. That's theft."

panels.title: Pineapple Fanta Search [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Ethan scans drink cooler — empty yellow slot — flat sigh.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Wrong country for yellow.*

panels.title: Ariana Jerky Pocket
panels.scene: Mr. Yang's jerky in pocket — doesn't share yet — eats standing.
panels.dialogue: Ariana: "Eat. Train. Stop talking."

panels.title: TJ Rules Reminder
panels.scene: Dorm hallway sign — **no speakers after nine** — Kieryn salutes.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "They have rules." · Kieryn: "I have headphones."

panels.title: First Night Unease
panels.scene: Lights out — six bunks — ceiling glow — nobody sleeps yet.

panels.title: Logan Gear Spread
panels.scene: Logan unpacks — iPad · snacks · extra mouthguards — organized chaos.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Corner starts before the bracket."

panels.title: Ethan Window [SOLO LEVELING]
panels.scene: Ethan alone at window — national center lights — *Arc 3 paid for that sentence* echo.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Different country. Same mat.*

panels.title: Team Floor Map
panels.scene: MV pins mat schedule — **Thursday** bracket — red circle.

panels.title: Chapter Button · Camp Eve
panels.scene: Dawn alarm **3:2:1** — feet hit floor together — first full camp day done.
panels.dialogue: MV (hallway): "Sleep was part of the assignment."

panels.title: Board Remedial Contrast [REAL #24 echo] ★ [PRESENT Korea + FLASH echo]
panels.scene: Korean staff lowers board in one sentence — cadet breaks in five tries — Ethan watches (**FLASH inset** Premier silent hour optional).
panels.dialogue: MV: "Different country. Same lesson you deserved at twelve."

panels.title: Cut List Anxiety [PRESENT]
panels.scene: Hallway nerves — Ariana: *"Corner or mat. Pick one."*

panels.scene: Whisper game — Miku ringtone vs K-pop · Logan's ramyeon · bracket dread.

panels.title: Ethan · Ultimate Counter Unlock [TEACH + ACTION] ★ [SOLO LEVELING]
panels.scene: Partner spin feint — Ethan **slides inside arc** — **spinning hook head** — sensor flash — guard **up**.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Arc 3 broke you with that kick. Arc 7 **you** throw it."

panels.title: Kieryn · Laser Stab Unlock [TEACH + ACTION]
panels.scene: Front-leg face snap **+3** on taller dummy — before partner reacts.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Laser Stab. Front leg. Face. Before they blink."

panels.scene: Hip-line trunk **+2** → flop kick head — full chain clean — Kian grins at Ethan.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "Bean pole can't copy this." · Ethan: "Watch me not need to."

panels.title: Staff Clipboard Row [TEACH]
panels.scene: Korean staff + MV — five empty signature lines — pens ready.
panels.dialogue: MV: "One sequence you can repeat when your brain goes quiet."

panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "If that's real, I'm—" · MV: "If it's real, you'll hear it from me."

panels.title: Ariana Corner or Mat [HAIKYUU]

panels.scene: Miku ringtone vs K-pop · Logan's ramyeon stash · bracket dread on ceiling.

panels.scene: Logan yelps — Kieryn serene — Ethan counts seconds like rounds.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Ninety seconds is three stories." · Logan: "I'm dying in act one."

panels.scene: Official scale — −58 Ethan · −49 Kian · −42 Ariana — all pass.

panels.scene: Clipboard complete — five names — five sequences — bracket clock **T-minus 18 hours**.

panels.scene: Ariana vs Korea TC cadet — bandages under guards noted.

panels.scene: Ariana silent walk — scoreboard **2–5** — Logan tablet ready.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Three — then down. Don't get greedy on ten."

panels.scene: Punch **+1** · cut **+2** · clinch blocked — **plants** — **3–5**.

panels.scene: Stands — hand over mouth — sits — can't look away.

panels.title: Whirling Hits 4–6 [ACTION]
panels.scene: Feint · cut body **+2** · roundhouse shell — **plants** — **5–5 tied**.

panels.title: Logan Mouths Plant [ACTION]
panels.scene: Corner — tablet **PLANT AFTER 9** — Logan silent scream.
panels.dialogue: Logan: *(mouths)* "Plant after nine."

panels.title: Hits 7–9 Pressure [ACTION]
panels.scene: Forward pressure — kicks land — **no plant after nine** — foot still airborne.

panels.scene: Logan jumps — **DOWN!** — Ariana hears — too late.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "DOWN!"

panels.title: Hit 10 Lands [ACTION]
panels.scene: Tenth kick connects — foot **never plants** — sensor vs rule conflict.

panels.title: Gam-jeom Impact [TEACH + ACTION] ★
panels.scene: Ref arm up — **Gam-jeom!** — scoreboard **5–6** — lose by one.

panels.scene: MV steady — no yell — towel ready.
panels.dialogue: MV: "You knew the rule. You chose the tenth anyway."

panels.scene: Bow to opponent — to ref — chin up — small smile for herself.

panels.title: Mr. Yang Proud [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Father at rail — first open pride — no checklist speech.

panels.title: Logan Guilt Seed [HAIKYUU]

panels.dialogue: Logan: "NOW!"

panels.title: Final Bell 11–9 [ACTION]
panels.scene: Bell — board **11–9** — TJ chest heaving — knee screaming silent.

panels.title: Probe Round [ACTION]
panels.scene: Min-ho distance — Ethan counter stance — doesn't bite feint.

panels.title: Shoulder Tell [TEACH]
panels.scene: Left shoulder drops — slow-mo inset — flash stack setup.

panels.title: Ultimate Counter [ACTION] ★
panels.scene: Spinning hook **+5** — **Logan taps shoulder** · MV calls counter — guard up — flash stack intercut Arc 1/3/5.
panels.dialogue: MV: "—Ultimate Counter—FIVE! Guard UP!"

panels.title: Min-ho Adjusts [ACTION]
panels.scene: Body volume — berserker temptation — Ethan breathes — **−2** exchange.

panels.title: Eliminated on Points [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Min-ho arm raised — Ethan bows steady — **TJ in aisle** — roster patch visible — last Kwon's bout of the trials.
panels.dialogue: MV: "The board says out. Your guard stayed up." · TJ: "You read it." · Ethan: "I still lost." · TJ: "Yeah. And you're still standing."

panels.title: Round 1 Distance Chess [ACTION]
panels.scene: Min-ho disciplined probe — Ethan counter stance — octagon center empty.

panels.title: Cut Feint No Bite [ACTION]
panels.scene: Min-ho cut feint — Ethan **doesn't step in** — MV corner nod.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Good. Make him show it."

panels.title: Min-ho Cut Commit [ACTION]
panels.scene: Round 2 — real cut kick — Ethan **does not retreat** — Pattern A setup.

panels.title: Logan Shoulder Tap [ACTION]
panels.scene: Corner — phone flat illegal — Logan taps Ethan's pad — **Now!**
panels.dialogue: Logan: *(tap)* "Now!"

panels.title: Slide Inside Arc [ACTION] [SOLO LEVELING]
panels.scene: Ethan slides inside spin arc — guard chamber high — epic speed lines.

panels.title: Flash Stack Intercut [ACTION]
panels.scene: Arc 3 Derek · Arc 1 nightmare · Premier drop · Arc 5 STOP — four insets one kick.

panels.title: Ultimate Counter +5 Impact [ACTION] ★
panels.scene: Spinning hook head — PSS **+5** flash — Min-ho stumbles — arena blur.
panels.dialogue: MV: "—Ultimate Counter—FIVE! Guard UP!"

panels.title: Guard Up Recovery [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ethan hands high — no berserker charge — Min-ho resets.

panels.title: Min-ho Body Volume [ACTION]
panels.scene: Min-ho smiles — trunk rhythm **+2 +2** — Olympic chess volume.

panels.title: Berserker Breath [ACTION]
panels.scene: Red edge flicker — Ethan **exhales** — grief is not a technique — stays present.
panels.dialogue: MV (V.O.): "Grief is not a technique."

panels.title: Exchange −2 [ACTION]
panels.scene: Min-ho cut on exit — Ethan **−2** — chin open **two seconds** — still standing.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Two seconds on the chin. Progress. Not enough today."

panels.title: Final Round Volume [ACTION]
panels.scene: Round 3 — Min-ho activity flood — Ethan behind on board — no panic charge.

panels.title: Growth Not Victory [HAIKYUU] ★
panels.scene: Bow exchange with Min-ho — MV corner after — empty upper seats — **no rage drop**.
panels.dialogue: Min-ho: "You didn't flinch on the spin." · Ethan: "Last year I was still in a bleacher in my head." · MV: "National team isn't the only proof. **Character** is. Pack tomorrow — not broken."
